utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- financing: includes solution and terms (type, down payment, loan amount, rate, term, monthly payment, fee) — sufficient.
- legal_services: includes legal services with costs (package and cost) — sufficient.
- moving_services: includes moving arrangements with costs (package and cost) — sufficient.
- setup_services: includes utility and setup services (breakdown and total) — sufficient.
- total_budget: includes complete cost breakdown (line items and total initial outlay) — sufficient.
All 6 items are present and fully specified.
